results.title: Install OpenClaw CLI for the Nylas Plugin | Nylas CLI
results.description: The package has been on npm since early 2025 and averages over 12,000 weekly downloads as of May 2026. Running npm install -g openclaw places the openclaw binary in your npm global bin directory, typically at $(npm config get prefix)/bin/.
